jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Vedantu, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
